description_long: This ornate sconce features a wrought iron frame with elegant, sweeping curves and scrollwork, forming a symmetrical, chandelier-like structure. Six candle-shaped light sources are evenly distributed around the frame, each with a warm, amber glow that mimics real candles. The central body is suspended from a short chain, suggesting it is designed to hang from above. The ironwork is painted matte black, providing a striking contrast to the soft, glowing lights. The overall design is both decorative and functional, evoking a vintage or rustic aesthetic suitable for upscale urban environments. The craftsmanship emphasizes both durability and visual appeal, making it a focal point in any setting.
description: A decorative wrought iron sconce with six candle-like lights and intricate scrollwork, suspended by a chain. The design is vintage and elegant, with a warm, inviting glow.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of six candle-like lights and the ornate scrollwork of the iron frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the curved arms and the even spacing of the candle lights around the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back curvature of the iron arms and the attachment point for the hanging chain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the scrollwork and the distribution of the candle lights.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, rustic design with ornate wrought iron scrollwork and a chandelier-like form. Its style is reminiscent of traditional European or old-world lighting.
